'''Hern''' was the innermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Rhinnal system/Legends|Rhinnal system]]. It was a molten rock, uninhabitable for life.<ref name="Core Worlds" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
